word: G180 - ἀκατάπαυστος - akatápaustos - ak-at-ap'-ow-stos - That cannot cease

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: That cannot cease
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
to taste, eat insatiable, unable to stop, unceasing
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1 (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2664; unrefraining: - that cannot cease.
